calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming That Assets Are Property Of Trust (Probate Code 850(A)(3) And 17200.1)
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ann C. McArthur for Anne E. Holland, Trustee (via Zoom).

The Court considered whether to require probate of the pour-over will and determined that it would not be necessary under the circumstances, noting the equitable arguments made by petitioner.

The Court also addressed whether personal service on the would-be intestate heirs was required. Petitioner confirmed that all heirs had received mailed notice of the petition and its supplements and had been in contact with the trustee, who had also distributed personal property to them.

The Court called for any objections, and no objections were raised. There being no objections, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
